name: measuredFieldRef
title: measuredFieldRef
description: References a field measurement point, which means measuring a specific connection between consumer and provider for a service field.

parameters.name: Field
parameters.description: Field, determining the data type of the object.

row: Name Name of the measurement endpoint
Path Full path of the measurement endpoint (including namespaces)
ConsumerIndex Index of the consumer. Note that the index may change if consumers are added or removed.
ProviderIndex Index of the provider. Note that the index may change if providers are added or removed.
measuredService The measurement point at the service.
SubscriptionState State of the field subscription: Unknown: the field subscription was not observed yet Unsubscribed: the field is not subscribed Subscribed: the field is subscribed
